summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: Payment Flow Fix (orders only created after approval), Category Display Mode System, and Group Deal Savings Badge. All backend tests passed (8/8). Frontend UI verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features tested and working: (1) POST /api/payments-governance/product-checkout and POST /api/commercial-flow/create-product-checkout no longer create orders - only checkout+invoice. Orders are created only after payment approval via POST /api/payments-governance/finance/approve. (2) GET /api/vendor-ops/catalog-config returns categories as rich objects with display_mode, commercial_mode, sourcing_mode fields. Settings Hub Product Categories tab shows expandable cards with Display Mode (Visual/List&Quote), Pricing Behavior (Fixed/Quote/Hybrid), Vendor Sourcing (Single/Competitive) radio selectors. (3) Group Deal cards show prominent green savings badge (bg-green-600 text-white) with 'Save TZS X' text.

frontend_ui_tests: Group Deals page - 13 deal cards displayed with green savings badges
Settings Hub Product Categories tab - 12 categories with expandable config panels
Category config panel - Display Mode (2 radios), Pricing Behavior (3 radios), Vendor Sourcing (2 radios)
Sourcing Strategy tab - Default Sourcing Mode, Max Vendors, Quote Expiry, Lead Time settings
Product Upload Wizard - Category dropdown with 13 options working correctly

payment_flow_fix.details: POST /api/payments-governance/product-checkout returns checkout+invoice but NOT order. Order is created only after POST /api/payments-governance/finance/approve

category_display_mode_system.details: GET /api/vendor-ops/catalog-config returns rich category objects with display_mode, commercial_mode, sourcing_mode. Settings Hub shows expandable category cards with radio selectors for each mode.

group_deal_savings_badge.details: DealCard component shows prominent green badge (bg-green-600 text-white) with 'Save TZS X' text when original_price > discounted_price
